headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) After Its 48% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Interactive Brokers Group is still good value after a strong run, or if most of the upside is already priced in? This article breaks down what the current market price might be implying about the stock. The shares most recently closed at US$66.12, with returns of 48.2% over 1 year and very large gains over 5 years. This is set against a 3.7% decline over 7 days, an 11.1% decline over 30 days, and a 1.7% decline year to date. Recent headlines have focused on Interactive Brokers...
